'''shavoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kaboodle|kaboodle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kaboodle|kaboodle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shavoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæveseth|shæveseth]] || [[word:shævesej|shævesej]] || [[word:shævesesh|shævesesh]] || [[word:shævese|shævese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavovosoth|shavovosoth]] || [[word:shavovosoj|shavovosoj]] || [[word:shavovososh|shavovososh]] || [[word:shavovoso|shavovoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavosoth|shavosoth]] || [[word:shavosoj|shavosoj]] || [[word:shavososh|shavososh]] || [[word:shavoso|shavoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavofsoth|shavofsoth]] || [[word:shavofsoj|shavofsoj]] || [[word:shavofsosh|shavofsosh]] || [[word:shavofsof|shavofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shavosotho|shavosotho]] || [[word:shavosojo|shavosojo]] || [[word:shavososho|shavososho]] || [[word:shavosoko|shavosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shavosoth|shavosoth]] || [[word:shavosoj|shavosoj]] || [[word:shavososh|shavososh]] || [[word:shavoso|shavoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shavosothol|shavosothol]] || [[word:shavosojol|shavosojol]] || [[word:shavososhol|shavososhol]] || [[word:shavosokol|shavosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shavosothotho|shavosothotho]] || [[word:shavosojojo|shavosojojo]] || [[word:shavososhosho|shavososhosho]] || [[word:shavosoko|shavosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shavosothon|shavosothon]] || [[word:shavosojon|shavosojon]] || [[word:shavososhon|shavososhon]] || [[word:shavosokon|shavosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shavosothoro|shavosothoro]] || [[word:shavosojoro|shavosojoro]] || [[word:shavososhoro|shavososhoro]] || [[word:shavosokoro|shavosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
